title: ACT Summer Prep Intensive (June)
description: The ACT Summer Prep Intensive will equip your student with the confidence and technical skills required to master the ACT. Designed for rising 10-12 graders, this session provides a comprehensive toolkit of proven strategies across the reading, writing, and math portions of the exam. Through intensive practice and focused content reviews, students will sharpen their test-taking abilities and work to master specific methods needed for high-level scoring.

title: All Athletes Sports Camp (June)
description: The All Athletes Sports Camp is designed to build confidence in foundational sports skills such as hopping, running, and jumping, while also providing opportunities for students to develop more complex abilities through group sports like soccer and basketball. title: Sew &Grow (June)
description: Student Audience: Students going into grades 2-5, inclusive class encouraged (both students with and without disabilities, including students who participate in SLC, Life Skills, FA, and Resource programming. Sew & Grow provides a supportive, small-group environment where students strengthen fine motor skills, coordination and confidence through hands-on stitching projects. Each session begins with focused warm-ups to build hand strength and reinforce foundational writing skills before introducing a new stitch. Students follow step-by-step instruction and apply their learning to purposeful creations they can proudly take home. Throughout the week, campers build independence, practice collaboration and experience success in a calm, structured setting designed to support individual growth.
